summary: Tested consolidated ProviderContracts component (iteration 94). Found and fixed critical config issue where frontend endpoint paths didn't match backend. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: Doula and Midwife contracts pages load correctly with proper config when navigating through tab bar.

bugs_fixed.issue: DOULA_CONTRACTS_CONFIG and MIDWIFE_CONTRACTS_CONFIG used wrong endpoint paths (e.g., '/doula-contracts' instead of '/doula/contracts')
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated all endpoints to match backend routes: list, create, update, delete, send, duplicate now use '/doula/contracts' and '/midwife/contracts' patterns. Also fixed clientsEndpoint to '/doula/clients' and '/midwife/clients'

critical_code_review_comments: Thin wrapper pattern working correctly - (doula)/contracts.tsx (8 lines) and (midwife)/contracts.tsx (8 lines) correctly import respective configs
ProviderContracts.tsx (1156 lines) properly uses config.endpoints, config.primaryColor, config.roleLabel, and config.sections for role-specific behavior
contractsConfig.ts (258 lines) correctly defines ContractsConfig interface with typed endpoints including function types for dynamic paths
Code consolidation successful: 3037 lines reduced to 1430 lines (53% reduction as stated)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - both Doula and Midwife contracts pages working

seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo data. Test contracts created/deleted during pytest run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contracts screens consolidated using shared ProviderContracts component with config pattern. CRITICAL: Endpoint paths fixed from hyphenated format (/doula-contracts) to slash format (/doula/contracts) to match backend. Both Doula (with demo contract for Emma Johnson) and Midwife (empty state) contracts pages working. Navigation must go through proper route groups - direct URL /contracts won't work correctly due to Expo Router group matching.

doula_contracts_list.evidence: API returns contracts array, UI shows Emma Johnson contract with Signed status, $1800 fee

midwife_contracts_list.evidence: API returns empty array, UI shows correct empty state with 'Midwifery Services Agreement' text

doula_contract_creation.evidence: pytest test_create_doula_contract passed - created and deleted test contract

midwife_contract_creation.evidence: pytest test_create_midwife_contract passed - created and deleted test contract

contract_duplicate.evidence: Both doula and midwife duplicate endpoints return 200

contract_send.note: Backend endpoint exists and structure is correct, not tested via UI due to email sending

config_pattern.evidence: Both roles correctly use their respective configs with proper primaryColor and roleLabel

backend_tests_summary.TestDoulaContractCRUD: 5/5 PASSED - create, update, duplicate, pdf, delete
backend_tests_summary.TestMidwifeContractCRUD: 5/5 PASSED - create, update, duplicate, pdf, delete
